On this page

App Emulators ​

These emulators can be installed by either sideloading, downloading through Jailbreak apps e.g. Sileo, or downloading from app stores such as Apple's App Store or AltStore.

By Emulator ​

iOS Emulator Compability Table
Emulators written in bold are recommended (highly known emulators).

EmulatorSideload LinkApp Store Link / StatusPricePlatform(s)Is on AltStore?
AD Boy*N/AAD BoyFreeMultiple
AluneAluneAluneFreePS2
ArcadeManiaMAME4iOSArcadeManiaFreeArcade (MAME)
ARMSX2ARMSX2N/AFreePS2
BigPEmuN/ABigPEmu$Atari Jaguar
Consoles^(V)N/AConsoles$Multiple
Delta / LegacyDeltaDelta / Delta LegacyFree / FreeMultipleYes
DolphiniOSDolphiniOSN/AFreeGamecube/WiiYes
DukeXDukeXN/AFreeXboxYes
Emu64 XL*N/AEmu64 XLFreeCommodore 64
eNESN/AeNESFreeNES
FinN/AFinFreeGameCube/Wii
FlycastFlycastN/AN/ADreamcastYes
FoliumFoliumFolium$3DS/NDS/GBA
GammaN/AGammaFreePS1
GEKKO C64N/AGEKKO C64FreeCommodore 64
iAltairN/AiAltairFreeMITS Altair 8800
iDOS 2 / 3iDOS 2iDOS 3$DosBox
iFBAsN/AiFBAsFreeArcade (FBAlpha)
iFly EMUN/AiFly EMUN/ADreamcast
iMSX2N/AiMSX2$MSX / MSX2
iPSX2iPSX2N/AFreePS2
Linking BoyN/ALinking BoyFreeGBA
MAME4iOSMAME4iOSArcadeManiaFreeArcade (MAME)
Manic EMUManic EMUManic EMUFreeMultiple / All
Mini vMacMini vMacN/AN/AMac OS classic
PicpicN/APicpicFreePico-8
Play!Play!N/AN/APS2
PlumeN/AN/AN/ADreamcast
PPSSPPPPSSPPPPSSPPFreePSP
ProvenanceProvenanceProvenanceN/AMultiple
RetroArchRetroArch NightlyRetroArchFreeMultiple / All
RetromanN/ARetroman$NES/GBA
Retro PalN/ARetro PalIAPGB/GBC/NDS/GBA
RTM EMUN/ARTM EMUFreePS2
SameBoySameBoySameBoyFreeGBA
Sakura PSXN/ASakura PSX$PS1
ScummVMScummVMScummVMFreePC (Point & Click games)
SpectaculatorN/ASpectaculator$Sinclair ZX Spectrum
Super16BitN/ASuber16BitFreeSNES
SurumeN/ASurume$PS2
SutātoN/ASutāto$GB/NES
TailFinN/ATailFinFreeWii U
UTM SEUTM SEUTM SEFreeRetro PCs
VionVionN/AFreePS Vita
VirtualFriend^(V)N/AVirtualFriendFreeNintendo
VirtualKimN/AVirtualKimFreeKIM-1/Apple-1
XeniOSXeniOSN/AFreeXbox 360
Yaba Sanshiro 2 / LiteN/AYaba Sanshiro 2 / Yaba Sanshiro 2 Lite$ / FreeSega Saturn
ZX81N/AZX81FreeSinclair ZX81
  • [*] - These emulators are not recommended by the general community. They may contain trackers, annoying ads, collect your data, or are otherwise buggy. They are safe to use, but better options may be available.
  • [N/A] - Data is not available at the moment, it may be updated in the future.
  • [^(W)] - Also available on Apple Watch
  • [^(V)] - Also available on Apple Vision Pro

By Platform ​

Note that only some well-known recommended systems are listed, and these emulators may support even more lesser-known platforms.

PlatformEmulators
ArcadeArcadeMania/MAME4iOS (MAME), Manic EMU, iFBAs (FBAlpha), RetroArch (FBNeo)
Atari 2600, 5200, 7800Consoles, Manic EMU, RetroArch
Atari JaguarBigPEmu, Manic EMU
Atari LynxManic EMU, RetroArch
DOOM EngineGenZD, Manic EMU, RetroArch
JAVA(J2ME)Manic EMU
Neo Geo PocketConsoles, RetroArch
NESConsoles, Delta, Folium, Manic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch
Nintendo 3DSFolium, Manic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch
Nintendo 64Delta, Manic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch
Nintendo DSDelta, Folium, Manic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch, Retro Pal
Nintendo GameCubeDolphiniOS, Fin, Folium
Nintendo GBA/GBCArcEmu, Consoles, Delta, Folium, Manic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch, Retro Pal
Nintendo WiiDolphiniOS, Fin
Nintendo Wii UTailFin, MeloCafe
PS1Folium, Gamma, Manic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch, Sakura PSX
PS2Alune, ARMSX2, iPSX2, Play!, Surume, RTM EMU
PSPManic EMU, PPSSPP, Provenance, RetroArch
PS VitaVion
Sega Genesis / Mega DriveConsoles, Delta (Paid only), Folium, Manic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch
Sega Master SystemManic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch
Sega Game GearManic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch
Sega 32XConsoles, Manic Emu, Provenance, RetroArch

Sega SaturnManic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch, Yaba Sanshiro 2

SNESDelta, Folium, Manic EMU, Provenance, RetroArch
Virtual BoyConsoles, Manic EMU, RetroArch, VirtualFriend
WonderSwanConsoles, RetroArch
XboxDukeX

Web-Based Emulators ​

EmulatorLinkPlatforms
44VBA44VBAGBA
AfterPlayAfterPlayMultiple
AuroraAuroraMultiple
DS PlayerDS PlayerNintendo DS
EmulatorJSEmulatorJSMultiple

Online Tools ​

  • RetroPad Editor
    • Create custom overlays for RetroArch.
  • Online ROM Patcher
    • An online web-based ROM patcher.
    • Supported formats: IPS, BPS, UPS, APS, RUP, PPF and xdelta.
  • Online Archive Extractor
    • Archive Extractor is a small and easy online tool that can extract over 70 types of compressed files, such as 7z, zipx, rar, tar, exe, dmg and much more.
    • Supported formats: 7z, zipx, rar, tar, exe, dmg, iso, zip, msi, nrg, gz, cab, bz2, wim, ace alz, ar, arc, arj, bin, cdi, chm, cpt, cpio, cramfs, crunch, deb, dd, dms, ext, fat, format, gpt, hfs, ihex, lbr, lzh, lzma, lzm, mbr, mdf, nsa, nds, nsis, ntfs, pit, pak, pdf, pp, qcow2, rpm, sar, squashfs, squeeze, sit, sitx, swf, udf, uefi, vdi, vhd, vmdk, warc, xar, xz, z, zoo, zi, jar.

Last updated: May 28, 2026
